title: Sophia Swarm Plan
description: Dispatch contract emitted by agent.swarm_router.SwarmRouter and consumed by agent.subagent.delegate. The agent-altitude analog of an MoE routing decision: task -> {teams, k, budgets}. Version 1.0.0 (semver): field names are the contract; the trained router head replaces how a plan is produced, NOT this shape.

mode.description: solo = the backbone answers in one isolated child (no fan-out); swarm = fan out the assignments below.

assignments.description: Empty iff mode == 'solo'. One entry per spawned team.

k.description: Number of independent children of this team (>=2 buys error-decorrelation).

budgetUsd.description: Per-child soft cost ceiling (a child that overruns is reported over_budget and treated as not-ok).

goal.description: The scoped goal handed to each child of this team.

reduce.description: The only permitted reduce: synthesise ONLY from children that returned evidence; zero successful children -> ABSTAIN (agent.subagent.ABSTAIN_NO_CHILDREN). Never synthesise from failures.

signals.description: The auditable features behind the decision (transparency; the trained head may add fields).

rationale.description: Human-readable trace of which rule fired for each assignment.

estCostSteps.description: Honest upper-bound compute estimate: sum of k*max_steps over teams (solo = backbone steps). Reported so the solo-vs-swarm trade is measured, not hidden.

nAgents.description: Total children = sum of k over assignments.
